# kUSBInformationDeviceIsConnectedBit

**Enumeration Case**

The system has connected the USB device to its hub.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsConnectedBit = 3
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsConnectedBit
